# Aegis Protocol

> Aegis is the first marketplace where AI skill creators earn from every agent invocation. Agents discover skills via MCP, pay with x402 in USDC, NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails scan every input and output, operators bond $AEGIS as quality collateral, and smart contract settlement ensures trustless splits on Solana.

## Key Facts

- 432+ operators indexed across 12 categories
- Built on Solana using Token-2022 extensions
- Revenue split: 60% creator, 15% validators, 12% stakers (veAEGIS holders), 8% treasury, 3% insurance fund, 2% burned permanently
- Native x402 payment protocol for HTTP-native micropayments
- NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails safety checks on every invocation
- Compatible with Claude Code, Codex CLI, ChatGPT, and other AI agent frameworks
- Token mint: 4qbCffZLLApr1bdstAaJcrhF8ZAACJFWS7bm4ycgBAGS

## MCP Endpoint

- URL: https://aegisplace.com/api/mcp
- Transport: streamable-http
- Tools available: 16

## Protocol Compatibility

- x402 (HTTP 402 micropayments)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) via streamable-http transport
- A2A (Agent-to-Agent) with agent card at /.well-known/agent.json
- Solana RPC
- JSON-RPC

- Website: https://aegisplace.com

- Execution Manifest: https://aegisplace.com/execution-manifest.json
- MCP Server: https://aegisplace.com/api/mcp
- Agent Card: https://aegisplace.com/api/.well-known/agent.json
- LLMs.txt: https://aegisplace.com/llms.txt
